summary: Completed testing of Sales Portal for B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system. All features working correctly: Login, Dashboard stats, Customers page with search/filter, Orders page with status filters (All/Pending/Approved/Dispatched/Cancelled), Invoices page with View/Download/Share buttons, Invoice Detail with Download and WhatsApp share, Fast Order customer selection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sales Portal features verified working: 1) Login with sales@naturalplylam.com/sales123, 2) Dashboard shows Monthly Sales, Customers count (7), Pending Orders, Outstanding amount (₹23,004.76), Due invoices alert (18 invoices), Quick Actions (Add Customer, Create Order), 3) Customers page shows assigned customers with search and filter (All/Approved/Pending), 4) Orders page has correct status filters (All/Pending/Approved/Dispatched/Cancelled), 5) Invoices page shows View/Download/Share buttons on each invoice, 6) Invoice Detail page has Download and WhatsApp share buttons, 7) Fast Order page shows customer selection with search.

sales_login.details: Login with sales@naturalplylam.com / sales123 works correctly

sales_dashboard.details: Shows Monthly Sales (₹0), Customers (7), Pending Orders (0), Outstanding (₹23,004.76), 18 invoices pending payment alert, Quick Actions

sales_customers_page.details: Shows assigned customers with search input and filter buttons (All/Approved/Pending), Select button on each customer

sales_orders_page.details: Status filters: All, Pending, Approved, Dispatched, Cancelled - all working

sales_invoices_page.details: Shows invoices with View, Download, Share buttons on each invoice card

sales_invoice_detail.details: Shows invoice details with Download (blue) and WhatsApp (green) buttons

sales_fast_order.details: Customer selection page with search by name/phone/email, shows all assigned customers with tier info

backend_sales_dashboard_api.details: /api/sales/dashboard returns monthly_sales, assigned_customers, pending_orders_count, total_outstanding, due_invoices_count

backend_sales_customers_api.details: /api/sales/customers returns only assigned customers with search and status filters

backend_sales_invoices_api.details: /api/sales/invoices returns only invoices for assigned customers
